mapper.insert: INSERT INTO QUALITY_ISSUE ( issue_id, upload_id, issue_type_code_value_id, column_code, detail_json_path, status_code_value_id, resolved_by_user_id, resolved_at, detected_stage_code_value_id, issued_at ) VALUES ( #{issueId}, #{uploadId}, #{issueTypeCodeValueId}, #{columnCode}, #{detailJsonPath}, #{statusCodeValueId}, #{resolvedByUserId}, #{resolvedAt}, #{detectedStageCodeValueId}, #{issuedAt} )
